MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Stephanie L. Southwick, Esq., of Gilliss Valla & Dalsin, LLP, (925) 962-9009, for Plaintiff and Moving Party
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SUBMITTED A COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE ALONG WITH A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. PLAINTIFF W & Y INVESTMENTS, LLC'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint was taken under submission for the Court to verify whether the proof of service is proper.
